title: Il Tempo Libero
scenario: You're discussing hobbies and weekend plans with an Italian friend.

lines.speaker: luca
lines.english: What do you do in your free time?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Mi piace giocare a calcio e ascoltare musica.
lines.english: I like playing football and listening to music.

lines.speaker: luca
lines.english: Do you play on a team?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Sì, giochiamo ogni sabato al parco.
lines.english: Yes, we play every Saturday at the park.

lines.speaker: luca
lines.italian: Io preferisco il nuoto. Vado in piscina.
lines.english: I prefer swimming. I go to the pool.

lines.speaker: luca
lines.italian: Due volte. Il martedì e il giovedì.

lines.speaker: you
lines.english: What do you do at the weekend?

lines.speaker: luca
lines.italian: Il sabato vado al cinema con gli amici.
lines.english: On Saturday I go to the cinema with friends.

lines.speaker: luca
lines.italian: Sì! La domenica leggo libri o vado in palestra.
lines.english: Yes! On Sunday I read books or go to the gym.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Io la domenica esco con la famiglia.
lines.english: On Sunday I go out with the family.

lines.speaker: luca
lines.italian: Vuoi venire al concerto venerdì sera?
lines.english: Do you want to come to the concert Friday evening?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Sì, mi piacerebbe molto! A che ora?
lines.english: Yes, I'd like that a lot! What time?

lines.speaker: luca
lines.italian: Alle otto. Ci vediamo alla stazione.
lines.english: At eight. See you at the station.

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you say you like listening to music?
How would you ask what someone does at the weekend?
How would you say you go to the gym on Monday?
